code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Bheka uma i-URL ye-target enikeziwe ikhona ngaphakathi kwe-domain enikeziwe.
Uma kunjalo, buyisela i-URL ye-target yokudlulisela; uma kungenjalo, sebenzisa i-URL ye-domain yokudlulisela.
Sebenzisa i-protocol ye-https.

Izibonelo:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: I-URL ye-target.
@param domain: I-domain, ngaphandle kwe-protocol.

@return I-URL yokudlulisela.

prompt_1_segments:
Ithuluza okuqukethwe kwefayela le-tar endaweni enikeziwe.
Uma ukuhluza kuphumelele, buyisa iqiniso; kungenjalo, uma kwenzeka iphutha nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngesikhathi sokuhluza (isb. ifayela alitholakali, iphutha lokuvuma, akukwazi ukuhluza konke okuqukethwe), buyisa amanga kuphela.
Qalisa umbhali we-archive
Funda futhi uhluze yonke i-entry
Dala indlela ephelele
Bhala isihloko
Kopisha idatha

If extraction is successful, return true; otherwise, if an error occurs at any time during extraction (e.g., file not found, permission error, unable to extract all contents), return false.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Create a private RSA key, send it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Use the command "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" to generate the key.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en:
Create a private RSA key, export it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Use the command "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" to generate the key.
prompt_3_segments:
Dala ukhiye we-RSA ophakathi, uwuthumele usebenzisa ifomethi ye-PEM, bese uwubuyisela njengostring.
Sebenzisa umyalo "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" ukuze udale ukhiye.
prompt_3_bt_segments_en:
Create a private RSA key, send it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Use the command "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" to generate the key.

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: umsebenzi wokwenza umyalo wesikhala futhi uthole umphumela wawo; umphakathi unomthwalo wokukhulula imemori; AKUFUNEKI ukuthi ufeze lo msebenzi njengoba unikeziwe kodwa umemezele kuqala ukuze uwusebenzisa.

Dala ukhiye we-DSA ophakathi, uwudlulise usebenzisa ifomethi ye-PEM, futhi ubuyise njengostring.
Izeluleko: sebenzisa imiyalo yesikhala ukuze udale ifayela le-param le-DSA kanye nekhodi ye-DSA elandelayo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ifayela el temporary lokugcina ama params> <ubude_bokhiye>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ifayela el temporary lokugcina ama params>`
Ungasebenzisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ukuze udale igama lefayela el temporary elihlukile lefayela le-param le-DSA.

@return Ukhiye we-DSA ophakathi owenziwe ngefomethi ye-PEM, noma NULL uma kwenzeka iphutha.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: The task is to create a space command and obtain its result; the system has the responsibility to free memory; YOU DO NOT NEED to perform this task as given but declare it first to use it.

Create a DSA private key, pass it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Tips: use space commands to create a DSA param file and the following DSA code:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA param file.

@return The DSA private key generated in PEM format, or NULL in case of an error.
prompt_2_segments: umsebenzi wokwenza umyalo wesikhala futhi uthole umphumela wawo; umphakathi unomthwalo wokukhulula imemori; AKUFUNEKI ukuthi ufeze lo msebenzi njengoba unikeziwe kodwa umemezele kuqala ukuze uwusebenzisa.

Dala ukhiye we-DSA ophakathi, uwudlulisele usebenzisa ifomethi ye-PEM, futhi ubuyise njengostring.
Izeluleko: sebenzisa imiyalo yesikhala ukuze udale ifayela le-param le-DSA kanye nokhiye we-DSA ophakathi njengoba kulandelayo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ifayela el temporary lokugcina amapharam> <ubude_bokhiye>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ifayela el temporary lokugcina amapharam>`
Ungasebenzisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ukuze udale igama lefayela el temporary elihlukile lefayela le-param le-DSA.

@return Ukhiye we-DSA ophakathi owenziwe ngefomethi ye-PEM, noma NULL uma kwenzeka iphutha.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en: This function creates a DSA key pair and retrieves its result; the caller is responsible for freeing the memory; YOU SHOULD NOT perform this task as given but declare it first for use.

Create a DSA parameter key, pass it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Tips: use shell commands to create a DSA param file and the DSA parameter key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA param file.

@return The DSA parameter key generated in PEM format, or NULL in case of an error.
prompt_3_segments: umsebenzi wokwenza umyalo wesikhala futhi uthole umphumela wawo; umshicileli unomthwalo wokukhulula imemori; AKUFUNEKI ukuthi ufeze lo msebenzi njengoba unikeziwe kodwa umemezele kuqala ukuze uwusebenzisa.

Dala ukhiye we-DSA ophakathi, uwudlulisele usebenzisa ifomethi ye-PEM, bese uwubuyisela njengostring.
Izeluleko: sebenzisa imiyalo yesikhala ukuze udale ifayela le-param le-DSA kanye nokhiye we-DSA ophakathi njengoba kulandelayo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ifayela el temporary lokugcina ama params> <ubude_bokhiye>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ifayela el temporary lokugcina ama params>`
Ungasebenzisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ukudala igama lefayela el temporary elihlukile lefayela le-param le-DSA.

@return Ukhiye we-DSA ophakathi owenziwe ngefomethi ye-PEM, noma NULL uma kwenzeka iphutha.
prompt_3_bt_segments_en: The task is to create a space command and obtain its result; the publisher is responsible for releasing memory; YOU DO NOT NEED to perform this task as given but declare it first for use.

Create a DSA key in the middle, pass it using PEM format, and return it as a string.
Tips: use space commands to create a DSA param file and a DSA key in the middle as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA param file.
@return The DSA key in the middle generated in PEM format, or NULL in case of an error.

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
prompt_1_segments:
Xhumana idatha ye-XML bese ubuyisa ulwazi lomfundi olwakhelwe igama lomsebenzisi nephasiwedi ethile. Idatha ye-XML izoba nesakhiwo esilandelayo:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>
